languages.original_text: "Thank you, Proctor. I will alert the High Factotum and oversee the initiation of the Merovians into the ship's forces. The planetary infantry... will have to be thoroughly trained."

languages.text: "Спасибо, проктор. Я предупрежу Высокого фактотума и возьму под контроль посвящение меровцев в корабельные войска. Планетарная пехота... придется хорошенько обучить".
languages.translation_comment: The guardsmen of the new regiment took an oath of allegiance to the Rogue Trader

languages.text: "Thank you, Proctor. I will alert the High Factotum and oversee the initiation of the Merovians into the ship's forces. The planetary infantry... will have to be thoroughly trained."
languages.original_text: "Спасибо, проктор. Я предупрежу Высокого фактотума и возьму под контроль посвящение меровцев в корабельные войска. Планетарная пехота... придется хорошенько обучить".

traits.locale_text: "Thank you, Proctor. I will alert the High Factotum and oversee the initiation of the Merovians into the ship's forces. The planetary infantry... will have to be thoroughly trained."
"Thank you, Proctor. I will alert the High Factotum and oversee the initiation of the Merovians into the ship's forces. The planetary infantry... will have to be thoroughly trained."
"Thank you, Proctor. I will alert the High Factotum and oversee the initiation of the Merovians into the ship's forces. The planetary infantry... will have to be thoroughly trained."

languages.text: 「ありがとうございます、プロクター。私は最高官僚に連絡し、メロヴィアンの艦内部隊への編入を監督します。惑星歩兵隊は…徹底的な訓練を受けることになりますね」
languages.original_text: "Thank you, Proctor. I will alert the High Factotum and oversee the initiation of the Merovians into the ship's forces. The planetary infantry... will have to be thoroughly trained."

traits.locale_text: 「ありがとうございます、プロクター。私は最高官僚に連絡し、メロヴィアンの艦内部隊への編入を監督します。惑星歩兵隊は…徹底的な訓練を受けることになりますね。」

languages.text: « Merci, proctor. Je vais alerter le haut factotum, puis je superviserai l'intégration des Meroviens aux troupes du vaisseau. L'infanterie planétaire... aura besoin de suivre une formation poussée. »
languages.original_text: "Thank you, Proctor. I will alert the High Factotum and oversee the initiation of the Merovians into the ship's forces. The planetary infantry... will have to be thoroughly trained."

traits.locale_text: « Merci, proctor. Je vais alerter le haut factotum, puis je superviserai l'intégration des Meroviens aux troupes du vaisseau. L'infanterie planétaire... aura besoin de suivre une formation poussée. »

languages.text: "Danke, Proktor. Ich werde das Hochfaktotum informieren und die Aufnahme der Merovianer in die Truppen des Schiffs überwachen. Die planetare Infanterie ... muss gründlich ausgebildet werden."
languages.original_text: "Thank you, Proctor. I will alert the High Factotum and oversee the initiation of the Merovians into the ship's forces. The planetary infantry... will have to be thoroughly trained."

traits.locale_text: "Danke, Proktor. Ich werde das Hochfaktotum informieren und die Aufnahme der Merovianer in die Truppen des Schiffs überwachen. Die planetare Infanterie ... muss gründlich ausgebildet werden."

languages.text: "Sağ olasın Üsteğmen. Arşıkâhya'yı uyaracağım ve Merovluların gemi kuvvetlerine katılımını denetleyeceğim. Gezegen piyadeleri... Kapsamlı bir eğitimden geçirilmeli."
languages.original_text: "Thank you, Proctor. I will alert the High Factotum and oversee the initiation of the Merovians into the ship's forces. The planetary infantry... will have to be thoroughly trained."

traits.locale_text: "Sağ olasın Üsteğmen. Arşıkâhya'yı uyaracağım ve Merovluların gemi kuvvetlerine katılımını denetleyeceğim. Gezegen piyadeleri... Kapsamlı bir eğitimden geçirilmeli."

languages.text: «Gracias, procurador. Avisaré al Sumo Factótum y supervisaré el alistamiento de los merovianos en las fuerzas de la nave. La infantería planetaria... tendrá que someterse a una rigurosa instrucción».
languages.original_text: "Thank you, Proctor. I will alert the High Factotum and oversee the initiation of the Merovians into the ship's forces. The planetary infantry... will have to be thoroughly trained."

traits.locale_text: «Gracias, procurador. Avisaré al Sumo Factótum y supervisaré el alistamiento de los merovianos en las fuerzas de la nave. La infantería planetaria... tendrá que someterse a una rigurosa instrucción».

languages.text: “感谢你，监察官。我会通知高阶顾问，并监督梅罗夫人加入舰队的仪式。这些行星防御部队……需要接受严格的训练。”
languages.original_text: "Thank you, Proctor. I will alert the High Factotum and oversee the initiation of the Merovians into the ship's forces. The planetary infantry... will have to be thoroughly trained."

traits.locale_text: “感谢你，监察官。我会通知高阶顾问，并监督梅罗夫人加入舰队的仪式。这些行星防御部队……需要接受严格的训练。”
